name: Microsoft Windows RCE Vulnerability - Suspicious IPs
notes:
This rule detects known Windows RCE IPs.

Note: Tune based on log sources to reduce number of events matching against this rule.
conditions_text: when any of Source Address, Destination Address are contained in any of Windows RCE IPs - IP
TD_list: APPLY Microsoft Windows RCE Vulnerability - Suspicious IPs on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of Source Address, Destination Address are contained in any of Windows RCE IPs - IP
RED_list: Event name: Microsoft Windows RCE Vulnerability - Suspicious IPs
Event description: Detects when RCE IPs are seen.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
